arts.ttl: Adzic: Juventus’ rising star ready to shine under Motta’s guidance
arts.sum: Vasilije Adzic, the 18-year-old Montenegrin attacker who joined Juventus this summer from Budućnost, is poised to make his mark on the first team. Despite facing early setbacks due to muscular injuries, Adzic is now ready to showcase the potential that prompted the Bianconeri to invest in him. Calciomercato report how Thiago Motta, Juventus’ manager, has expressed high hopes for the young talent. “You’ve seen little of him,” Motta stated, “but he’s a strong player.” The coach has been particularly impressed by Adzic’s posture on the field, noting that he appears more “open” and in tune with the team’s tactical requirements. The post Adzic: Juventus’ rising star ready to shine under Motta’s guidance appeared first on FootItalia.com.
